com.android.decode

接口 FrameSaveListener


  • public interface FrameSaveListener
    This interface is used by the application to listen to the decoder's frame save event. This is intended to be used with the addFrameSaveListener method of the BarcodeManager class. More than one object instance can listen to the decoding events in an application. More than one application can listen to decoding events in the system.
    另请参阅:
    BarcodeManager

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void onFrameSave(SavedFrame frame)
      onFrameSave method will be called when a frame saved event is fired.

    • 方法详细资料

      • onFrameSave

        void onFrameSave(SavedFrame frame)
        onFrameSave method will be called when a frame saved event is fired. When a frame is not saved for an error onFrameSave will not be called, an exception, if enabled, will be thrown by the ErrorManager.
        参数:
        frame - The data read as defined by
        另请参阅:
        SavedFrame
